records.summary: A devcontainer image is built from the resolved configuration and the build outcome is reported.
A created container's observable state (running status, labels, mounts, environment) reflects the resolved configuration.
A command is executed inside the container with its output streamed and its exit code propagated.
The up flow creates a container from the resolved configuration with the expected environment and remote user.
A well-formed devcontainer.json is parsed and its resolved (and optionally merged) configuration is emitted.
